scope.target: Create a validator-ready problem-frame pilot for an external-system integration use case
scope.dependency_radius: Problem-frame documentation and workflow artifacts only
constraints: Match the validator's expected file layout
Keep the example portable and external-system focused
Do not edit unrelated user changes in the worktree
non_goals: No repository-wide policy mandate to use problem frames

inputs.architecture_target: Turn the validator from a dormant skill into a demonstrable repository capability
review_findings: The repository contains validator rules but no problem-frame example
The user wants an external-system integration example that can later be imported into a real project

steps: Create workflow artifacts for the pilot
Add root-level problem-frame guidance and semantic mapping notes
Add a reusable CBF external-system template
Verify that the validator's required file set exists
validation: The problem-frame example contains frame.yaml, machine/machine.yaml, machine/use-case.yaml, controlled-domain/aggregate.yaml, and acceptance.yaml
The example explicitly models external-system constraints and traceable scenarios
The documentation explains how problem frames relate to requirement and spec documents
deferred_items: Add SWF examples if the pilot proves useful
Add a dedicated authoring guide after real-project feedback

results.summary: Added a portable problem-frame pilot with workflow artifacts, a reusable CBF external-system template, and a worked payment authorization example that matches the validator's expected input structure.
tests_run: Structural verification by listing the required workflow and problem-frame files
